mapper.select: select user_id from mar_submit where goods_id=#{goodsId};
mapper.update: update mar_user set user_status=0 where id=#{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into mar_check(goods_id, check_time, user_id, status) values(#{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},now(),#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{status})
mapper.update: update mar_goods set goods_status=#{status} where id=#{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select count(*) from mar_check t where goods_id=#{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and status!=0

select mar_user.id user_id,user_name,mar_user.user_status,count(mar_check.status) count from mar_user left join mar_check on mar_user.id=mar_check.user_id left join user_role on mar_user.id=user_role.user_id where mar_check.status=-1 and user_role.role_id=1 group by mar_user.id
